title: Southern Company 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary annual-report source for Southern Company's 2025 net income, regulated utility structure, operating businesses, risk factors, and capital-intensive business model.

title: Our Companies
note: Company overview source describing Southern Company's electric utilities, natural gas utilities, wholesale energy, distributed energy, telecommunications, and national customer footprint.

title: Southern Company reports first-quarter 2026 earnings
note: Recent earnings release used to corroborate 2026 profitability and current operating context.

title: Southern Company (SO) - Market capitalization
note: Market-data source for Southern Company's May 2026 market capitalization estimate and registry snapshot sizing.

title: About OpenADR
note: Technical and standards source describing OpenADR as an open, secure, two-way information exchange model for smart-grid demand response and DER coordination.

title: OpenADR FAQ
note: Technical source explaining OpenADR demand-response and distributed energy resource use cases, including renewables, storage, EV batteries, charging infrastructure, and flexible loads.

title: OpenEMS - Open Source Energy Management System
note: Open-source project source for local and site-level energy management involving storage, renewables, EV charging, heat pumps, tariffs, and edge control.

title: Grid eXchange Fabric - LF Energy
note: Open-source project source for field-device monitoring and control across microgrids, smart metering, public lighting, and distribution automation use cases.

title: Grid eXchange Fabric GitHub organization
note: Repository source for GXF code and project structure, formerly known as Open Smart Grid Platform.

title: Real-Time Distributed Energy Resource Energy Dispatch Using Distributed Control
note: Open-source software source for distributed control and real-time dispatch of distributed energy resources such as distributed photovoltaic systems.

title: Open Energy Monitor
note: Background source describing OpenEnergyMonitor as an open-source hardware and software project for energy monitoring, energy efficiency, and distributed renewable microgeneration.
